case_title: VINSON, FAITH, THROUGH HER GUARDIAN AD LITEM AND et al VS MCCORD ROSEMARY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINSON, FAITH, THROUGH HER GUARDIAN AD LITEM AND NATURAL PARENT HARRISON VINSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCORD ROSEMARY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.00, THE COURT APPOINTS HARRISON VINSON GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR FAITH VINSON A MINOR FOR PURPOSES OF THIS CASE. AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR FAITH VINSON, HARRISON VINSON SHALL HOLD ANY FUNDS RECOVERED FROM DEFENDANT IN AN ACCOUNT FOR THE BENEFIT OF FAITH VINSON, OR USE THE FUNDS FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE MINOR. THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VINSON, FAITH, THROUGH HER GUARDIAN AD LITEM AND NATURAL PARENT HARRISON VINSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORD ROSEMARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORD ROSEMARY
